ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF(OR(!ISBLANK( leaseworks__Escalation_Start_Date__c ), !ISNULL(leaseworks__Escalation_Start_Date__c)), OR(leaseworks__Escalation_Start_Date__c > leaseworks__Rent_End_Date__c , leaseworks__Escalation_Start_Date__c < leaseworks__Start_Date__c ) , false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Escalation Start date must fall between the Rent Start date & Rent End Date (inclusive).
